orientador.descricao: If the proposal theme was defined together with a PPGI advisor, please provide their name below.

cartaRecomendacao.descricao: You only need to correctly fill in the name and email of the people who will provide the recommendation letters. Once you complete and submit your application, the indicated individuals will receive an email with instructions on how to submit their recommendation letter online. At least 2 names are required.

motivos.descricao: Describe the reasons that led you to apply for the course

documentos.cartaOrientador: Advisor's Acceptance Letter in PDF (required for PhD)

finalizar: Finalize your registration? After this step, your data will be submitted for evaluation and cannot be changed.

recomendacaoEmail[].email: Please enter a valid email address

CartaAceiteOrientador.required: Advisor's Acceptance Letter is required for PhD
